function N(N)return t[N+(-261124-(-318900))]end for N,O in ipairs({{67276-67275;524091+-523831};{-376427-(-376428);409184+-409073};{742368+-742256,987436+-987176}})do while O[882422+-882421]<O[-21162+21164]do end do local N=type local O=math.floor local
